toolOracle.purpose: Funded AI/oracle request execution on Ambient.
notes: Funded requests must be approval-gated and capped before any transaction is signed.
Submit and reclaim lanes are adapter-backed through explicit client command templates until the in-package instruction builder is stabilized.
Wait and decode lanes use read-only RPC evidence and preserve raw account observations.

auction.purpose: Ambient auction API/program interface for oracle-related market operation.

oracleCryptoTickerExample.purpose: Reference app shape for Tool Oracle request/response integration.

notes: Quote/probe flows must not submit payment.
Payment flows require explicit spend caps, signer binding, immutable evidence, and user approval.
Approved paid request execution accepts a one-use payment header file and redacts payment material from stdout and artifacts.

liveTestLanes.description: Live read-only RPC methods such as getHealth, getVersion, and getSlot.
Ambient Desktop/Pi discovery and tool invocation against the bundled package.
Tool Oracle funded request submit and observe lane.
x402 paid endpoint quote, payment authorization, request, and evidence lane.
Local build/readiness, deploy/upgrade/authority plans, approved execution, observe, and teardown evidence lane.
Bounded local solana-test-validator readiness and opt-in lifecycle evidence lane.

safety.secretPolicy: Report configured booleans only. Never print, log, or artifact keypair contents or secret values.
